summary: Full backend + frontend testing of new features: Team Chat, Auto-enroll, WebSocket leaderboard, Animations, TradingPanel. All 9 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified.

issues: /arena route does not exist - Arena is mounted at / (root). The sidebar ARENA link goes to /, which is correct. Just noting the route for reference.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py now ~833 lines - exceeds 700-line limit, should be split into routers (teams, players, leaderboard, ws)
WebSocket leaderboard sends initial data on connect but polling interval is client-side (every 20s) - this is fine
Chat anonymous sender (nonexistent player id) correctly returns 'Anonymous' - good fallback
seed_data_creation: Test chat messages posted to Alpha Wolves team (TEST_Hello, TEST_persistence check, TEST_anon message). Test wallets registered: TEST_AutoEnroll*, TEST_IdempotentWallet_NewFeature.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: Team Chat (REST + WebSocket), Auto-enroll wallets, Live leaderboard WS, TradingPanel (Long/Short/Leverage/Wallet note), ADRENA logo neon flicker (text-glow-cyan), Leaderboard Live tab with 'Real Adrena Position Data' banner and WS LIVE badge. Arena is at / (root route) not /arena. TradingPanel shows 'CONNECT WALLET TO TRADE' when wallet not connected - this is correct behavior.
